svg.title: MemoX wordmark — dark usage (light-on-dark)
svg.desc: MemoX typographic wordmark set in Plus Jakarta Sans Extrabold, near-white #f6f5fc, for use on the dark canvas (--memox-bg #141220).

text.font-family: 'Plus Jakarta Sans', -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, 'Segoe UI', Roboto, Helvetica, Arial, sans-serif
